data.title: 国际服网页活动「Valkyrie Blues」
data.summary: [Valkyrie Blues Webview Event: Prologue Release] Sensei, the new episode featuring the Valkyrie Poli
data.body:
[Valkyrie Blues Webview Event: Prologue Release]

Sensei, the new episode featuring the Valkyrie Police School students is coming soon. The prologue will be available today—don’t miss it!

🎦Watch the Prologue: https://youtube.com/watch?v=76ckyfQ5m8o

#BlueArchive

[Valkyrie Blues Event Notice]

Sensei, we've prepared special episodes starring the Valkyrie Police School students!
Check in game, and the official YouTube channel, for heartwarming stories of peace and protection!

🗓️Event Schedule: 12/17 (Tue) 3:00 AM – 1/6/2025 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
➡️View Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2700776

#BlueArchive
